description_html:
General Rules :

  • Participants are free to use any type of camera: DSLR, mirrorless, point-and-shoot, or even smartphones. The quality and creativity of the photograph matter most.
  • No drone or aerial photography unless explicitly mentioned.
  • All submissions must be in JPEG or PNG format.
  • RAW images or other formats like TIFF, BMP, or GIF will not be accepted.
  • Minimum image resolution should be 300 DPI (dots per inch) for clear and high-quality prints or display.
  • The image size should be at least 1920 x 1080 pixels for proper evaluation
  • The maximum file size should not exceed 50 MB.
  • Compress the file appropriately to meet size requirements without compromising image quality.
  • No watermarks, signatures, or logos should be present on the submitted photograph. Any photo with identifying marks will be disqualified.
  • Participants can submit images with any aspect ratio (e.g., 4:3, 16:9, square), but it should maintain the integrity of the composition. No stretching or excessive distortion is allowed.
  • The participant must capture the image and should not contain any third-party content (e.g., stock images, graphics). Use of copyrighted images or content will lead to immediate disqualification.
  • EXIF data must be intact and unaltered. The photograph should include details like camera model, exposure settings, and date of capture. Ensure EXIF data is not stripped from the file when saving or exporting the image.
  • There are no restrictions on the use of manual or automatic camera settings (ISO, aperture, shutter speed, white balance, etc.).
  • Previously published or exhibited photos are not allowed, ensuring fresh and original submissions.

Round 1 Rules :

  • The two photographs should feel conceptually connected, as if they are moments captured by a time traveler across different eras.

    Note :You can interpret vintage and futuristic aesthetics through creative choices in mood, lighting, environment, styling, or color grading. It is not essential to include literal costumes, props, or science fiction elements.

    The top 15 entries from Round 1 will be selected through scores which will be based on the following evaluation criteria:

    • Creativity and originality of the concept: 30%
    • The technical excellence of the photograph: 25%
    • Relevance to the theme of the contest: 25%
    • Overall impression and impact: 20%

Submission Requirements For Round 2 :

  • Participants will be given a limited time to take the photos based on the given theme.
  • The photographs should be submitted as per the instructions given during the on-the-spot briefing.
  • Submission should be a Photo Story comprising of 5 photos and the theme will be provided on the spot.
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram
